testcase.name: showChatContextMenu() > does nothing gracefully when elements.chatContextMenu is null
showChatContextMenu() > sets style.left and style.top and makes the menu visible
showChatContextMenu() > adjusts position if menu overflows the right edge of the viewport
hideChatContextMenu() > does nothing gracefully when elements.chatContextMenu is null
hideChatContextMenu() > sets display to none
handleChatClick() > does nothing when chat is falsy
handleChatClick() > does nothing when chat.id is absent
handleChatClick() > calls browser.tabs.create with the reader URL for a valid chat
handleChatContextMenu() > calls event.preventDefault()
handleChatContextMenu() > sets contextMenuChat on state to the given chat
handleChatContextMenu() > renders review date "Set review date" when chat has no reviewDate and is not stale
handleChatContextMenu() > renders review date label when chat has a reviewDate
handleChatContextMenu() > renders stale warning when chat.flaggedAsStale with no reviewDate
handleChatContextMenu() > renders stale warning with reviewDate when flaggedAsStale
updateChatRatingWidget() > does nothing when no #chatRatingWidget element exists
updateChatRatingWidget() > marks stars up to the rating as active
updateChatRatingWidget() > sets aria-pressed correctly on each star button
updateChatRatingWidget() > clears all active stars when rating is 0
setupChatContextMenuActions() > does nothing when elements.chatContextMenu is null
setupChatContextMenuActions() > wires click handlers to [data-chat-action] items
setupChatContextMenuActions() > logs a warning when no chat is selected for an action
handleRateChatAction() > does nothing when contextMenuChat is null
handleRateChatAction() > sets rating when chat does not already have that rating
handleRateChatAction() > clears rating (sets to null) when the same value is clicked again
handleRateChatAction() > calls renderer.setChatData with the returned chats
handleChatSaved() > resets save button to default when user cancels from the assign dialog
handleChatSaved() > adds the chat to state.chats before showing dialog
handleChatSaved() > updates the chat and saves tree when dialog returns a result
handleChatSaved() > replaces stale duplicate chat in state.chats
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > rename: calls showRenameChat for the context chat
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > rename: updates chat when dialog returns a result
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > edit-tags: calls showEditTags
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > edit-tags: updates tags when dialog returns result
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > move: calls showMoveChat
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > move: moves chat and calls saveTree when dialog returns result
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > set-review-date: calls showSetReviewDate
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > set-review-date: updates reviewDate when dialog returns result
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > export: calls showExportChat
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > export: calls dialog.alert when showExportChat throws
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [ERROR] Export chat failed: Error: Boom at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:637:67 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:145:11 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:26 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1243:20 at new Promise (<anonymous>) at runWithTimeout [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1209:10[90m)[39m at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1653:37 at Traces.$ [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4mvitest[24m/dist/chunks/traces.CCmnQaNT.js:142:27[90m)[39m at trace [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4mvitest[24m/dist/chunks/test.B8ej_ZHS.js:239:21[90m)[39m at runTest [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1653:12[90m)[39m

testcase.name: private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > delete: removes chat from state immediately (optimistic UI)
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > delete: calls saveTree and removeChat after deferred timer when chat has a topicId
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > delete: undo button restores the chat to state (no topic)
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > delete: undo button restores a chat that belonged to a topic (covers topic.chatIds.push)
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: copies chat to clipboard successfully
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: shows error notification when clipboard result is not ok
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: shows tooLarge notification when result.tooLarge is true
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: shows error when chatRepo.loadFullByIds returns empty
private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > copy: shows error when chatRepo.loadFullByIds rejects
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [WARN] Copy: failed to load chat content Error: load fail at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:768:59 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:145:11 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:26 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1243:20 at new Promise (<anonymous>) at runWithTimeout [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1209:10[90m)[39m at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1653:37 at Traces.$ [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4mvitest[24m/dist/chunks/traces.CCmnQaNT.js:142:27[90m)[39m at trace [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4mvitest[24m/dist/chunks/test.B8ej_ZHS.js:239:21[90m)[39m at runTest [90m(file:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:1653:12[90m)[39m

testcase.name: private chat-action handlers via setupChatContextMenuActions > unknown action: does not throw and logs a warning
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > shows confirm dialog when a different chat shares the same title
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > resets save button to default when overwrite is declined
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > removes duplicate and saves tree when overwrite is confirmed
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > matches title case-insensitively
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > does not show confirm dialog when chatEntry.id matches the found title
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > places overwritten chat in the duplicate's original topic (nested topic fix)
handleChatSaved() — Feature d: duplicate title overwrite > does not call moveChatToTopic when duplicate has no topicId
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > does not call triggerAutoExport when autoExportEnabled is false
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > increments chatsSinceLastAutoExport when threshold not reached
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > calls triggerAutoExport and resets counter when threshold is reached
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > uses default threshold of 10 when autoExportThreshold is absent
handleChatSaved() — Feature c: auto-export > does not throw when browser.storage.local.get rejects
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [WARN] Auto-export check failed: Error: storage error at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:957:64 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:20

testcase.name: checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > does not call triggerAutoExport when autoExportEnabled is false
checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > increments chatsSinceLastAutoExport when threshold not reached
checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > calls triggerAutoExport and resets counter when threshold is reached
checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > uses default threshold of 10 when autoExportThreshold is absent
checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > does not throw when browser.storage.local.get rejects
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [WARN] Auto-export check failed: Error: storage error at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:1022:64 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:20

testcase.name: checkAndTriggerAutoExport() > threshold 1: triggers on the very first save
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > does nothing when contextMenuChat is null
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [WARN] No chat selected for action: overwrite

testcase.name: handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error notification when tabs.query throws
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when no active tab is found (tab.id is falsy)
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when tabs.query returns empty array (no tab)
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when tabs.sendMessage throws
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows extraction error when response.success is false (no custom error)
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows custom error when response.success is false and error is set
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when extractResponse has no data
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when chatData has messageCount 0 and no messages array
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > returns without updating when user cancels the confirm dialog
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > shows error when chatRepo.updateChat throws
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [ERROR] Overwrite chat failed: Error: DB error at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/tests/chat-actions.test.js:1223:50 at [90mfile:///C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/index.js:915:20

testcase.name: handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > success path: updates renderer, calls renderTreeView, shows success toast
handleOverwriteChatAction via setupChatContextMenuActions > success: uses tab.url as fallback when chatData.url is empty
